name: Infinigence AI
description: Chinese GPU cloud and LLM inference startup (无问芯穹) offering heterogeneous compute for AI training/inference.

seo.title: Infinigence AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Infinigence AI: Chinese GPU cloud and LLM inference startup (无问芯穹) offering heterogeneous compute for AI training/inference.

when_to_use: Running low-cost GPU inference for LLMs at Chinese datacenters
Deploying open-source models on affordable Chinese cloud GPU
Scaling LLM throughput for high-volume consumer AI products
Accessing Nvidia H800 capacity for ML training in China

cons: Performance varies by underlying hardware pool
Early-stage — tooling and SLAs still maturing
review.verdict: Interesting bet if you need scale GPU compute inside China's constrained supply chain.
review.best_for: China-based AI teams needing GPU capacity when H100s are blocked
review.not_for: Global teams with access to NVIDIA-standard hyperscaler clouds
